  • [ - ] 123Football - member since 03-Jan-23

    Nice remains unbeaten at home this season, while Lens nearly held the same record away until PSG ended it. In H2H, Nice leads 10-1 but given both teams form, Nice double chance is the safer bet. Nice draw no bet at 1.76 is also worth considering. Also, worth considering Nice have put at least 2 goals in 7 of 9 at home matches
